import unreal
abp='/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
unreal.load_asset(abp)
# --- fix ModifyBone rotation modes via direct object iteration ---
fixed=[]
for o in unreal.ObjectIterator():
    try:
        if o.get_class().get_name()=='AnimGraphNode_ModifyBone' and 'ABP_Bodycam' in o.get_path_name():
            node = o.get_editor_property('node')
            bone = node.get_editor_property('bone_to_modify')
            bname = str(bone.get_editor_property('bone_name'))
            node.set_editor_property('rotation_mode', unreal.BoneModificationMode.BMM_ADDITIVE)
            node.set_editor_property('rotation_space', unreal.BoneControlSpace.BCS_COMPONENT_SPACE)
            node.set_editor_property('translation_mode', unreal.BoneModificationMode.BMM_IGNORE)
            node.set_editor_property('scale_mode', unreal.BoneModificationMode.BMM_IGNORE)
            o.set_editor_property('node', node)
            fixed.append((bname, o.get_path_name()))
    except Exception as e:
        fixed.append(('ERR', str(e)))
print('FIXED:', fixed)
# --- inspect Walk graph sequence player pins ---
pins = unreal.BlueprintService.get_node_pins(abp, 'Walk', 'FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19')
print('WALK SEQ PINS:', pins)
